name: Splash Dino
short_description: Drag objects (wooden boxes and triangles and other objects) to help the little dino throw the wooden ball into the water. And remember that dino can help you with tips (hints), skips and dino coins. 115 levels.
detailed_description:
Drag objects (wooden boxes and triangles and other objects) to help the little dino throw the wooden ball into the water. And remember that dino can help you with tips (hints as black and red frames), skips and dino coins.

At the beginning of the game you have 30 dino coins, 20 tips (hints) and 10 skips. Every second level you receive an additional dino coin. You can use dino coins to increase the number of tips and skips you have. Tips help you complete a level faster, while skips allow you to jump to the next level.

Are you ready to test your brain with this colorful, cute and challenging puzzle game? Good luck! 115 levels.
about_the_game:

At the beginning of the game you have 30 dino coins, 20 tips (hints) and 10 skips. Every second level you receive an additional dino coin. You can use dino coins to increase the number of tips and skips you have. Tips help you complete a level faster, while skips allow you to jump to the next level.

Are you ready to test your brain with this colorful, cute and challenging puzzle game? Good luck! 115 levels.
